MODULE: cosmos.web.cosmosynapse.engine.cosmos_swarm_orchestrator
FILE: cosmos/web/cosmosynapse/engine/cosmos_swarm_orchestrator.py (1486 lines)
CATEGORY: web

DESCRIPTION: Cosmo's Swarm Orchestrator - 12D CST Architecture
=================================================
The "Brain" of the Swarm. It orchestrates sub-models (Ollama, Gemini, Claude)
and synthesizes their outputs through a 54D Hebbian State.

Key Features:
- Fan-out/Fan-in Architecture
- Hebbian Weight U

CLASSES:
- SwarmResponse: Response from a single model with physics annotations.
- SwarmResult: Combined result from the swarm orchestration.
- CosmosBackend: Wrapper for the local 12D/54D CosmosTransformer.
Handles loading, tokenization, 
  Methods: def load(self, checkpoint_path: str)
  Methods: async def generate(self, prompt: str, max_new_tokens: int=256, temperature: float=0.7) -> str
- CosmosSwarmOrchestrator: Cosmo's Swarm Orchestrator — the conductor of the AI orchestra.
Routes prompts t
  Methods: def set_synaptic_field(self, field)
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: async def query_swarm(self, prompt: str, user_physics: dict) -> list[SwarmResponse]
  Methods: async def cosmos_synthesize(self, prompt: str, model_responses: list[SwarmResponse], user_physics: d
  Methods: def learn_from_responses(self, responses: list[SwarmResponse], user_physics: dict)
  Methods: def apply_cooperative_feedback(self, feedback_score: float, participants: list[str]=None)
  Methods: async def generate_peer_response(self, prompt: str, system_prompt: Optional[str]=None, history: Opti
  Methods: def apply_feedback(self, model_name: str, feedback_score: float)
